tagline: Kick Up Your Feet, Enjoy a Beverage, and Walk Out Sporting a Fresh Cut

hero.headline: Your Private Retreat for Distinguished Grooming
hero.subheadline: Salt Lake City's exclusive members-only barbershop and social club. Kick back with a beverage, enjoy vinyl music, and leave looking your absolute best.
checkmarks: Expert barbers, massage therapists & skin care specialists
Vintage curated lounge with complimentary amenities

services.headline: Everything a Gentleman Needs
services.subtitle: Full-service grooming, relaxation, and social amenities under one roof — all included with your membership.

cards.title: Barber Services
cards.description: Expert haircuts, hot towel shaves, and precision grooming from skilled barbers who take pride in classic technique and modern style.

cards.title: Massage Therapy
cards.description: Licensed massage therapists provide rejuvenating treatments to help you unwind, recover, and leave feeling completely renewed.

cards.title: Skin Care
cards.description: Professional skin care treatments tailored to keep you looking sharp and feeling confident every day.

cards.title: Haberdasher
cards.description: Curated accessories and fine haberdashery items for the well-dressed gentleman, available exclusively to members.

cards.title: Private Conference Room
cards.description: Complimentary one-hour bookings for members who need a private, professional space for meetings and calls.

cards.title: Penthouse Venue
cards.description: An exclusive penthouse space available for private events, celebrations, and special gatherings with your crew.

steps.title: Apply for Membership
steps.description: Submit your application and get approved to join Salt Lake City's most exclusive private club.

steps.title: Book Your Services
steps.description: Schedule barber appointments, massages, skin care, or reserve the conference room and penthouse at your convenience.

steps.title: Enjoy the Experience
steps.description: Walk in, kick up your feet, enjoy a beverage, connect with fellow members, and leave looking and feeling your best.

about.label: About Mac's Place
about.headline: A Private Club Salt Lake City Has Been Missing
about.description: Founded in 2019 in the Rio Grande neighborhood, Mac's Place is more than a barbershop — it's a private social club where members enjoy top-tier grooming, vinyl music, vintage decor, and genuine camaraderie. We cater to those who desire the best of the best in a relaxed, exclusive atmosphere.

features.title: Members-Only Access
features.description: Exclusive community benefits with private club access reserved for approved members only.

features.title: Team of 7 Professionals
features.description: Skilled barbers, licensed massage therapists, and skin care specialists dedicated to your experience.

features.title: Vintage Curated Atmosphere
features.description: Vinyl music, carefully curated decor, and complimentary beverages create the perfect environment to unwind.

pricing.headline: Invest in Your Experience
pricing.subtitle: Membership gives you access to all services, amenities, and the exclusive Mac's Place community. Contact us for current membership rates and availability.

guarantee.headline: The Mac's Place Promise
guarantee.description: Every visit should leave you feeling like the best version of yourself. If your experience doesn't meet expectations, our team will make it right — no questions asked. That's the standard we hold ourselves to.

faqs.question: How do I become a member?
faqs.answer: You can apply for membership through our website or by visiting Mac's Place in person. Our team will walk you through the process and benefits of joining our private club.

faqs.question: What's included with membership?
faqs.answer: Membership includes access to all grooming services (barber, massage, skin care), the private lounge, complimentary conference room bookings, beverages, and exclusive community events.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking appointments for barber services and massages to guarantee your preferred time. Walk-ins are welcome for lounge access and the haberdasher.

faqs.question: Where is Mac's Place located?
faqs.answer: We're located in the Rio Grande neighborhood of Salt Lake City, Utah. Contact us for the exact address and directions — we keep things exclusive.

faqs.question: Can I host a private event?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our penthouse venue is available for private events, celebrations, and gatherings. Reach out to our team to discuss availability and details for your occasion.

testimonials.name: Local Member
testimonials.text: The most chill people and place in SLC. Mac's Place provides something that Salt Lake has been missing but needed for years — a private club that caters to those who desire the best of the best.

testimonials.name: Club Member
testimonials.text: A unique oasis in Salt Lake City combining an inviting barbershop atmosphere with exclusive membership benefits. The skilled barbers and massage therapists ensure every visit leaves you feeling revitalized.

testimonials.name: Regular Patron
testimonials.text: The blend of style and comfort with captivating decor that reflects decades of carefully curated vintage charm. Top-notch services including exceptional haircuts, rejuvenating massages, and shoe shines.

contact.headline: Ready to Join the Club?
contact.subtitle: Apply for membership or schedule a visit to experience what makes Mac's Place unlike anything else in Salt Lake City.
benefits: Exclusive members-only access to all services

footer.description: Mac's Place is Salt Lake City's premier private members-only barbershop and social club, offering top-tier grooming, relaxation, and community since 2019.
